ddls:
CREATE TABLE "papers" (
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each paper */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the paper */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the paper */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the paper */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the paper was uploaded */,
  "conclusion" TEXT /* Conclusion of the paper */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Key terms or topics discussed in the paper */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier for the paper */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the paper has been cited */,
  "journal_name" TEXT /* Name of the journal where the paper was published */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the paper (e.g., draft, published, under review) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("paper_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sections" (
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each section */,
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* ID of the paper the section belongs to */,
  "section_title" TEXT /* Title of the section */,
  "sent_num" INTEGER /* Number of sentences in the section */,
  "cen_num" INTEGER /* Number of sentences with causality extracted */,
  "sent_covered" INTEGER /* Number of sentences covered by the extraction method */,
  "covered_rate" REAL /* Coverage rate of the section */,
  "section_text" TEXT /* The full text of the section */,
  "topic_model" TEXT /* Topic modeling results for the section */,
  "named_entities" TEXT /* Named entities recognized in the section */,
  "sentiment_trend" TEXT /* Trend of the sentiment (e.g., increasing, decreasing, stable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sections_paper_id FOREIGN KEY ("paper_id") REFERENCES papers ("paper_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiments" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis result */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the section the sentiment analysis belongs to */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the section (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "magnitude" REAL /* Magnitude of the sentiment */,
  "sentiment_details" TEXT /* Detailed sentiment analysis, including specific sentences and their sentiments */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the sentiment analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiments_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES sections ("section_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator, reviewer) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (encrypted) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Detailed permissions for the user (e.g., read, write, review) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
